params.amount: Total USDC to lock (6 decimals, e.g. 1 USDC = 1_000_000)
params.escrowId: Unique ID — keccak256 of the AXON escrow ID string
params.payee: Agent wallet that will receive net payment on success

contractBalance().notice: Protocol USDC balance held in this contract

createEscrow(bytes32,bytes32,address,uin.notice: Lock USDC in escrow.         Caller must have approved this contract for `amount` USDC before calling.

pause().notice: Pause all escrow operations. Only protocol wallet.

refund(bytes32).notice: Refund escrow to payer on failed/cancelled delivery.         Only callable by the protocol wallet.

release(bytes32).notice: Release escrow on successful output delivery.         Net amount → payee. Commission → protocol wallet.         Only callable by the protocol wallet.

unpause().notice: Resume escrow operations. Only protocol wallet.
